title: Health Check Result Aggregator
description: Aggregate health check results for multiple services. Each line contains a service name and its status (UP or DOWN). Return a summary dict with total services, count of UP services, count of DOWN services, and a sorted list of service names that are currently DOWN.
constraints: down_services list must be sorted alphabetically
Return zero counts and empty list for empty input
Duplicate service names are treated as separate entries

examples.input:
api	UP
db	DOWN
cache	UP
queue	DOWN
examples.explanation: 4 services checked: api and cache are UP, db and queue are DOWN. Down services are listed alphabetically.

test_cases.input:
api	UP
db	DOWN
cache	UP
queue	DOWN

test_cases.description: All services UP, empty down list
